extracted_items.content: Token refresh race condition in React Native app: when app resumes from background, multiple requests simultaneously attempt token refresh. Fix: implement promise-based mutex to ensure only one refresh is in-flight at a time; subsequent requests return the same promise.
Token storage: migrate from AsyncStorage to expo-secure-store for encrypted token storage. AsyncStorage is unencrypted and vulnerable if device is rooted.
Minimum supported OS versions: iOS 16 (minimum), Android API 29 (Android 10 minimum). These are fixed requirements.
